very_drunk.speaker: Kevin
very_drunk.text: DAVE! PERFECT timing. You're in the ZONE, Dave. The BUYING zone. Relaxed boundaries mean EXPANDED possibilities. Let's CLOSE.

buzzed.speaker: Kevin
buzzed.text: Dave! You seem RELAXED. Relaxed people make the BEST investment decisions. Do you have a MOMENT?

sees_cash.speaker: Kevin
sees_cash.text: Kevin's eyes lock onto your pocket. 'IS THAT CASH?? Dave. DAVE. You need to INVEST that cash. IMMEDIATELY. I have a PLAN.'

morning_intro.speaker: Kevin
morning_intro.text: 'DAVE! Early bird gets the worm! And the worm, in this case, is FINANCIAL FREEDOM!'

late_afternoon_intro.speaker: Kevin
late_afternoon_intro.text: 'Dave! The WINDOW is CLOSING. Regional conference is TONIGHT. Your LAST CHANCE to lock in founder's tier.'

already_pitched_cash.speaker: Kevin
already_pitched_cash.text: Kevin nearly levitates. 'Dave. DAVE. That cash has a DESTINY. Its destiny is ELEVATÉ Tier Two.'

already_pitched_guns.speaker: Kevin
already_pitched_guns.text: 'Dave! I've been THINKING. Your... associates. The WAREHOUSE guys. They need FINANCIAL LITERACY. I can TRAIN them.'

already_pitched_default.text: Kevin's eyes light up. 'Ready for Phase Two? This is where it gets EXCITING.'

beats.speaker: Kevin
beats.text: "DAAAAVE!" He materializes from behind a shrub. He was waiting.

beats.speaker: Kevin
beats.text: "Synergy. Downline. PASSIVE. INCOME." Words, just words, weaponized.

beats.speaker: Kevin
beats.text: He grabs a napkin. Starts sketching. It's a triangle. It's always a triangle.

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: You take a step back. Then another. Your feet remember danger.

beats.speaker: Kevin
beats.text: He locks eyes. He does NOT blink. The driveway gets quieter.

beats.speaker: Kevin
beats.text: "...and THAT, Dave, is why we are GENERATIONAL." He is sweating. Victoriously.

beats.speaker: Kevin
beats.text: He presses a glossy trifold into your palm. It's warm from his pocket.
The brochure cover: a crude pyramid in Sharpie, with little stick figures. On top: KEVIN.

beats.speaker: Kevin
beats.text: His pupils are two different sizes. His conviction is absolute.

decline.text: Kevin holds up a finger. 'That's what the last guy said. He's in Cabo now.' Kevin does not specify whether the man is vacationing or hiding.

kevin_defense.text: Kevin slams his hands on the whiteboard. 'IT'S A REVERSE FUNNEL.' The whiteboard wobbles dangerously.
